programme.title: UNNAMED MEMORY SEASON 2
programme.desc: 400 years ago, Tinasha destroyed Tuldarr in a single night. Oscar rewrote history, erasing the Witch of the Azure Moon.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Muroi was rescued by a Yuki-Onna on a mountain. Betrayed by friends and his wife, he moves to a town near a mountain.

programme.title: IN/SPECTRE SEASON 2
programme.desc: Muroi's suspected of killing his ex-wife when the police find her dead. There's a message written in blood on her hand.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: For the last practice match of the training camp, Karasuno High School is against Fukurōdani again.

programme.title: HAIKYU!! 2ND SEASON
programme.desc: Karasuno learns why Fukurōdani has one of the top volleyball teams in Tokyo.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Akutsu rescues Lily, skipping their date for a demon hunt. As they investigate wild dog attacks, a menacing gaze follows them.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: After training with his demon boss Liz, Akutsu gains confidence and sets out to corrupt Lily. As they battle in charm, Lily makes a desperate move.

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: Shiraishi finds a book that is discarded in the bookstore. After he picks it up, he realizes that is an erotic book!

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Shiraishi thinks he won't get chocolate from girls but actually finds one in his drawer!

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: Akutsu rescues Lily, skipping their date for a demon hunt. As they investigate wild dog attacks, a menacing gaze follows them.

programme.title: THE FOOLISH ANGEL DANCES WITH THE DEVIL
programme.desc: After training with his demon boss Liz, Akutsu gains confidence and sets out to corrupt Lily. As they battle in charm, Lily makes a desperate move.

programme.desc: At the hideout, Guel was taken prisoner by Olcott. Having killed his father, Guel remains sunk in deep despair. ......

programme.title: MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM THE WITCH FROM MERCURY SEASON2
programme.desc: Due to the incident, the school was in chaos. Miorine returns to school after a long hiatus from the hearing.

programme.title: KUBO WON'T LET ME BE INVISIBLE
programme.desc: Shiraishi finds a book that is discarded in the bookstore. After he picks it up, he realizes that is an erotic book!
